name: DLSI
summary: DLSI provides employment solutions in France, Switzerland, Luxembourg, Germany, and Poland. It offers services in the areas of indefinite-term to fixed-term contracts, and temporary employment services. The company collaborates with companies in various sectors, such as building, nuclear, electricity, accounting, maintenance, and others. It offers its services under the DLSI, PEMSA, and TERCIO brands. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Forbach, France.
